description.ko: 네온 불빛과 비가 우울한 미래의 분위기를 자아내는 낭만적이고 분위기 있는 사이버펑크 도시 경관.
description.en: A romantic and moody cyberpunk cityscape where neon lights and rain create a melancholic future atmosphere.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Sapphire Monsoon Gate.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta neon. Massive 3D holographic lotuses bloom in the rain, casting #00FFFF cyan light onto wet metallic asphalt. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, 8k resolution, capturing the melancholic soul of a futuristic metropolis.
